name: Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:10
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar, beating until light and fluffy.
3. Stir in the all-purpose flour until a stiff mixture forms.
4. Press the dough into a 15 x 10 x 1-inch jellyroll pan.
5. Prick the dough all over with a fork.
6. Chill for 30 minutes.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 300 degrees Fahrenheit and bake an additional 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
9. Cut into squares or diamond shapes while warm.
10. Sprinkle with powdered sugar before serving.
